steps.title: Define, build and validate the data specification and Power BI V1
steps.summary: Complete the graduate futures data specification, build Power BI V1 and validate it with selected users by September 2026.

outputs.title: Graduate futures data specification
outputs.summary: Sources, fields, owners, caveats, update cycles, suppression rules, segmentation and responsible-use principles.

outputs.title: Power BI V1 dashboard
outputs.summary: First dashboard iteration built with real programme, department or subject examples.

outputs.title: Validation and UAT findings
outputs.summary: User feedback captured and converted into a prioritised V2 improvement list.

decisions.title: Confirm V1 readiness standard
decisions.summary: Agree what must be true for Power BI V1 to count as ready for UAT.

decisions.title: Confirm UAT group
decisions.summary: Agree which users will validate V1.

risks.title: Validation is too shallow
risks.mitigation: Define UAT questions, user groups and success criteria before testing begins.

risks.title: Scope becomes too ambitious
risks.mitigation: Lock a minimum viable phase one specification.

steps.title: Produce and disseminate V2 self-service programme packs
steps.summary: Use V1 validation findings to produce V2 packs, disseminate and showcase them, hold faculty roundtables and submit an Education Committee executive report by Christmas 2026.

outputs.title: V2 self-service programme packs
outputs.summary: Packs programmes can understand and use informatively without a facilitated workshop first.

outputs.title: Dissemination and showcase plan
outputs.summary: Agreed routes for institutional use, visibility and uptake.

outputs.title: Faculty roundtable findings
outputs.summary: High-level observations, strengths, risks and questions captured.

outputs.title: Education Committee executive report
outputs.summary: Executive summary of initial data deep-dive findings, caveats and next steps.

decisions.title: Confirm mandatory showcase spaces
decisions.summary: Agree where V2 packs must be presented or made visible.

decisions.title: Confirm Education Committee route
decisions.summary: Agree report timing, format and route.

risks.title: V2 packs are mistaken for final judgements
risks.mitigation: Use caveats, developmental framing and showcase guidance.

risks.title: Christmas 2026 becomes overloaded
risks.mitigation: Confirm minimum viable outputs and prioritise essential routes.

steps.title: Design the programme workshop structure and materials
steps.summary: Create the workshop format, facilitation guidance, interpretation prompts, action-plan template, Graduate Premium Profile template, Story Pack template and structured return form in parallel with V2 production.

outputs.title: Programme workshop structure
outputs.summary: Practical workshop design moving from data interpretation to action and articulation.

outputs.title: Facilitation and interpretation materials
outputs.summary: Guidance for using the packs responsibly.

outputs.title: Programme output templates
outputs.summary: Profile, action plan, story pack and structured return templates.

decisions.title: Confirm operating model
decisions.summary: Agree what can run locally and what requires central support.

risks.title: Workshop model is too heavy
risks.mitigation: Design a light core structure with optional deeper modules.

steps.title: Test the workshop model with wayfinder programmes
steps.summary: Work with pre-identified wayfinder programmes to validate whether the V2 packs, workshop structure, interpretation guidance and output templates are useful, usable and appropriately framed.

outputs.title: Wayfinder workshop records
outputs.summary: Structured feedback from early partner programmes.

outputs.title: Validation findings for refinement
outputs.summary: Clear changes needed before priority rollout.

outputs.title: Early profile, action and story examples
outputs.summary: Initial examples of the outputs the process can create.

decisions.title: Select wayfinder programmes
decisions.summary: Agree early partner programmes that will validate the approach.

risks.title: Wayfinders are too atypical
risks.mitigation: Select programmes that provide useful variation.

steps.title: Refine the model after the wayfinder workshops
steps.summary: Use wayfinder learning to refine the dashboard, V2 packs, workshop materials, caveats, templates, support model and priority rollout plan.

outputs.title: Refined dashboard and pack model
outputs.summary: Changes made in response to validation and wayfinder findings.

outputs.title: Refined workshop toolkit
outputs.summary: Updated facilitation materials, prompts, caveats and templates.

outputs.title: Priority rollout plan
outputs.summary: Agreed priority segment criteria, schedule, support model and expected outputs.

decisions.title: Confirm priority segment criteria
decisions.summary: Agree how King's identifies priority programmes, departments, clusters or student-outcome segments.

risks.title: Refinement is not completed in time
risks.mitigation: Separate must-change items from later enhancements.

steps.title: Roll out workshops to identified priority segments
steps.summary: Run the refined workshop model with institutionally agreed priority programmes, departments, clusters or student-outcome segments by September 2027.

outputs.title: Priority segment workshop outputs
outputs.summary: Profiles, action plans, story material and structured returns.

outputs.title: Priority segment learning
outputs.summary: Patterns and support needs emerging from priority areas.

decisions.title: Confirm priority rollout scope
decisions.summary: Agree the September 2027 priority wave population.

risks.title: Priority selection feels punitive
risks.mitigation: Frame as targeted support and institutional learning.

risks.title: Faculty cascade is uneven
risks.mitigation: Use standard toolkit, ownership and structured returns.

steps.title: Refresh the data and move the data product into business as usual
steps.summary: Between January 2027 and September 2028, establish the data refresh rhythm, BAU ownership model, Power BI maintenance route and process for updating packs.

outputs.title: Data refresh model
outputs.summary: Agreed rhythm and ownership for refreshing data.

outputs.title: Power BI maintenance route
outputs.summary: Confirmed route for maintaining the dashboard and pack model.

outputs.title: Planning integration route
outputs.summary: How refreshed data feeds programme, faculty and institutional planning.

decisions.title: Confirm BAU owner and refresh cadence
decisions.summary: Agree ongoing product ownership, refresh timing and communications.

risks.title: Data product remains one-off
risks.mitigation: Confirm BAU ownership and maintenance route before final rollout completes.

steps.title: Roll out workshops to the remaining institution and synthesise findings
steps.summary: After wayfinder validation and priority segment rollout, extend the workshop model to the remaining agreed institutional coverage population and synthesise findings across all waves by September 2028.

outputs.title: Remaining institutional workshop outputs
outputs.summary: Outputs from the rest of the agreed coverage population.

outputs.title: Institutional graduate futures synthesis
outputs.summary: Typology of patterns, pathways, strategy types, strengths and support needs.

outputs.title: Feed-through to related King's Edge work
outputs.summary: Findings used for evidence packs, market activation, skills work and curriculum enhancement.

decisions.title: Confirm remaining coverage definition
decisions.summary: Agree coverage beyond wayfinder and priority waves.

decisions.title: Confirm synthesis route
decisions.summary: Agree where institutional findings are reported.

risks.title: Final wave sounds like general dissemination
risks.mitigation: Frame clearly as the remaining workshop rollout.

risks.title: Action plans are not followed up
risks.mitigation: Confirm HoDs as benefit owners and connect actions to planning routes.
